languages.text: "...банды эльдаров-корсаров под названием Духи-вороны. Необычайно агрессивны для своего вида. Гипотеза — принадлежность к миру-кораблю Лу'Насад, сгинувшему в этом секторе космоса, повлияла на ментальные структуры и привела к изменению повадок".

traits.locale_text: "Представитель банды эльдаров-корсаров под названием Духи-вороны. Необычайно агрессивны для своего вида. Гипотеза — принадлежность к миру-кораблю Лу'Насад, сгинувшему в этом секторе космоса, повлияла на ментальные структуры и привела к изменению повадок".

languages.text: "...of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."
languages.original_text: "...банды эльдаров-корсаров под названием Духи-вороны. Необычайно агрессивны для своего вида. Гипотеза — принадлежность к миру-кораблю Лу'Насад, сгинувшему в этом секторе космоса, повлияла на ментальные структуры и привела к изменению повадок".

traits.locale_text: "...of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."

"A member of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."

"A member of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."

"...of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."

languages.text: “……来自一个名为“鸦魂”的艾达灵族海盗团伙。对这个物种而言，该团伙的攻击性极为罕见。据我的推测，他们归属的方舟世界卢纳萨德在这片虚空中覆灭，使他们的精神结构受到了影响，最终导致了行为的改变。”
languages.original_text: "...of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."

traits.locale_text: “……来自一个名为“鸦魂”的艾达灵族海盗团伙。对这个物种而言，该团伙的攻击性极为罕见。据我的推测，他们归属的方舟世界卢纳萨德在这片虚空中覆灭，使他们的精神结构受到了影响，最终导致了行为的改变。”

languages.text: «... de una banda de corsarios Aeldari llamados los Espíritus Cuervo. Más agresivos de lo normal para su especie. Mi teoría es que el haber pertenecido al mundo astronave de Lu'Nasad, que fue destruido en este sector del vacío, afectó a sus estructuras mentales y condujo a este comportamiento alterado».
languages.original_text: "...of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."

traits.locale_text: «... de una banda de corsarios Aeldari llamados los Espíritus Cuervo. Más agresivos de lo normal para su especie. Mi teoría es que el haber pertenecido al mundo astronave de Lu'Nasad, que fue destruido en este sector del vacío, afectó a sus estructuras mentales y condujo a este comportamiento alterado».

languages.text: « ... d'une organisation de corsaires aeldaris appelée les Esprits du corbeau. Leur degré d'agressivité est inhabituel pour leur espèce. Mon hypothèse est la suivante : la destruction de leur foyer, le vaisseau-monde Lu'Nasad, a affecté leurs structures cognitives et altéré leur comportement en conséquence. »
languages.original_text: "...of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."

traits.locale_text: « ... d'une organisation de corsaires aeldaris appelée les Esprits du corbeau. Leur degré d'agressivité est inhabituel pour leur espèce. Mon hypothèse est la suivante : la destruction de leur foyer, le vaisseau-monde Lu'Nasad, a affecté leurs structures cognitives et altéré leur comportement en conséquence. »

languages.text: "Kargar Ruhları adlı bir Aeldari Korsanı grubunun mensubu. Türlerine göre alışılmadık derecede saldırganlar. Çalışma teorim, uçsuzun bu sektöründe yok olan Lu'Nasad gemidünyasına mensup olmalarının zihinsel yapılarını etkilediği ve bu değişmiş davranışa yol açtığı yönünde."
languages.original_text: "...of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."

traits.locale_text: "Kargar Ruhları adlı bir Aeldari Korsanı grubunun mensubu. Türlerine göre alışılmadık derecede saldırganlar. Çalışma teorim, uçsuzun bu sektöründe yok olan Lu'Nasad gemidünyasına mensup olmalarının zihinsel yapılarını etkilediği ve bu değişmiş davranışa yol açtığı yönünde."

languages.text: "... einer Bande von Aeldari-Korsaren ... der Geister der Krähe. Ungewöhnlich aggressiv für ihre Spezies. Ich habe die Arbeitstheorie, dass ihre Zugehörigkeit zum Weltenschiff Lu'Nasad, das in diesem Sektor der Leere zerstört wurde, Auswirkungen auf ihre mentalen Strukturen hatte, die ihr verändertes Verhalten bedingten."
languages.original_text: "...of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."

traits.locale_text: "... einer Bande von Aeldari-Korsaren ... der Geister der Krähe. Ungewöhnlich aggressiv für ihre Spezies. Ich habe die Arbeitstheorie, dass ihre Zugehörigkeit zum Weltenschiff Lu'Nasad, das in diesem Sektor der Leere zerstört wurde, Auswirkungen auf ihre mentalen Strukturen hatte, die ihr verändertes Verhalten bedingten."

languages.text: 「...アエルダリの海賊団、クロウ・スピリッツ。彼らの種族にしては異常に攻撃的だ。私の仮説は、この虚空の領域で滅んだクラフトワールド・ルナスドに属していたことが、彼らの精神構造に影響を与え、この変わった行動を引き起こしたのだ。」
languages.original_text: "...of a band of Aeldari Corsairs called the Crow Spirits. Unusually aggressive for their species. My working theory is that belonging to the craftworld Lu'Nasad, which perished in this sector of the void, has affected their mental structures and resulted in this altered behaviour."

traits.locale_text: 「...アエルダリの海賊団、クロウ・スピリッツ。彼らの種族にしては異常に攻撃的だ。私の仮説は、この虚空の領域で滅んだクラフトワールド・ルナスドに属していたことが、彼らの精神構造に影響を与え、この変わった行動を引き起こしたのだ。」
